faq.title: Visit Websites & Get Paid in {country} - FAQ

items.question: How do I get paid to visit websites in {country}?
items.answer: Simply sign up for free, browse our list of available websites, click on any offer, visit the website for the required time (usually 30-60 seconds), and you'll automatically earn cash. Payments are processed instantly to your PayPal account or other payment methods.

items.question: Is getting paid to visit websites legitimate?
items.answer: Yes, absolutely! Companies pay real money for website visits because they need real user feedback, traffic data, and engagement metrics. Cashog has paid over $3 million to 65,000+ members worldwide.

items.question: How much can I earn visiting websites in {country}?
items.answer: Most members earn $100-500 monthly by spending 30-60 minutes per day. Each website visit pays $0.05-$2.00 depending on the task complexity. High-paying opportunities ($0.50+) are available daily.

items.question: How do I receive my payments?
items.answer: You can withdraw your earnings via PayPal, Venmo, direct bank transfer (ACH), or choose from over 50 gift card options including Amazon, Walmart, and Starbucks. Payments are processed instantly with no minimum threshold.

items.question: Is Cashog free to join?
items.answer: Yes! Signing up is completely free. There are no membership fees, subscription costs, or hidden charges. You only earn money by visiting websites.

items.question: Can I do this on my phone?
items.answer: Yes! Our platform works perfectly on smartphones, tablets, and computers. You can earn money visiting websites from anywhere with an internet connection.

items.question: How much time do I need to invest?
items.answer: It's completely flexible. Some members earn $10-20 daily with just 15-20 minutes of website visits. You choose how many websites to visit each day based on your schedule.

items.question: Are there enough website visits available in {country}?
items.answer: Yes! We have partnerships with thousands of companies worldwide. New website visits are added daily, with 50-100+ opportunities available at any time for {country} members.
